title: Nature Witch
description: Nature Witch is a Nature & Magic based modpack!
body:
Inspired by my [All Of Nature](https://modrinth.com/modpack/allofnature) modpack.

Nature Witch is a modpack that provides a wide selection of mods ranging from Botania all the way to the famous Aether! Tectonic + smaller world generation have also been added to make the world feel a lot more lively! I really hope you enjoy becoming a Nature Witch with this modpack.

⭐ Key Mods
- Botania
- Blood Magic
- Bountiful
- Botany Pots
- Critters and Companions
- Ambient Sounds
- Ars Nouveau
- Farmer's Delight
- Enchanted: Witchcraft
- Friends&Foes
- Naturalist
- Nature's Aura
- Mystical Agriculture
- Mythic Mounts
- Nyf's Wearable Backpacks
- Occultism
- Ribbits + Shroom Dealers
- The Aether
- Let's Do [ALL OF THEM BASICALLY]
- Wizard's Reborn
- Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn


⭐ This modpack is in a EARLY stage and will have occasional updates, so stay tuned and I hope you enjoy this modpack!
